---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or a new platform to support
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What problem does this solve?**
A clear description of the need or frustration.

**Proposed solution**
What you'd like to see happen.

**New platform?**
If you're requesting support for a new AI site, please include:
- URL: <!-- e.g. https://example-ai.com -->
- The input box (textarea or contenteditable?)
- The send button (any stable selector/aria-label?)

**Alternatives considered**
Any other approaches you thought about.
